rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the residual numbers).
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (discussion section could be more focused on the active set).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (fabricated citation).
